'''Demophon''' was the primary [[Star/Legends|star]] of the [[Demophon system/Legends|Demophon system]]. A [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]] near the end of its life, it exploded as a [[Supernova/Legends|supernova]], [[Demophon supernova|destroying]] the system during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="S" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], scientists at the [[University of Sanbra]] analyzed the star, with the findings released 13:3:14. Cosmology Professor [[Deakis Ronse]] explained that they found Demophon to have chromospheric instabilities and spectrographic readings of [[Iron/Legends|iron]] and [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]] ejecta. Its life expectancy was deemed short, to end in a supernova within the century (50 to 75 standard years). It went supernova far before that time frame.<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|regional/13314_3.html|Scientists: Demophon Supernova Imminent}}</ref>
